name: IALFA
pitch: Interactive medieval bas-relief stone carving. Renders as a sandstone portrait with ambient-lit carved relief when idle. Hovering introduces a raking torchlight that follows the cursor, casting real-time ray-marched self-shadows across the carved features and revealing mineral veins in the stone. Moving the cursor fast generates velocity-driven stone dust particles.

lifecycle.idle: Soft ambient-lit sandstone bas-relief with carved portrait details, mineral veins, and screen-space ambient occlusion in recesses
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, raking torchlight begins to sweep across carved features revealing dramatic depth through ray-marched shadows
lifecycle.buildUp: Torch follows cursor, long self-cast shadows stretch across grooves and recesses, stone specular sheen emerges on polished surfaces
lifecycle.peak: Full raking torchlight with flickering flame jitter, deep self-shadowed relief, velocity-driven stone dust particles swirling from carved edges
lifecycle.recovery: Torch withdraws, shadows soften, stone settles back to ambient-lit relief state with gentle dust settling
